code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else
      if has
        if neg
          nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
        else
          nums = list.push(nums, cur)
        end
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      else
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
    else
      nums = list.push(nums, cur)
    end
  end

  let m = nums.len()
  mut sums: List<Int> = []
  mut total = 0
  mut j = 0
  while j < m
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    total = total + v
    sums = list.push(sums, total)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < m
    let v = match sums.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
